message:
feat(gateway): add file reservation conflict detection engine

Add ReservationConflictEngine for detecting overlapping file reservations
between agents. This prevents agents from clobbering each other's work
by detecting when requested patterns would conflict with existing
exclusive reservations.

Key features:

Pattern Overlap Detection:
- Converts glob patterns (*, **, ?) to regex for matching
- Uses path prefix analysis for early rejection
- Generates test paths to check bidirectional overlap
- Conservative approach: may false positive, never false negative

Conflict Management:
- Tracks active reservations per project with expiration
- Filters expired reservations automatically on access
- Identifies conflicts between exclusive reservations
- Supports same-requester extension (no self-conflict)

Resolution Suggestions:
- "wait": If reservation expires soon (<5min), suggest waiting
- "narrow": Suggest more specific patterns to avoid overlap
- "share": Suggest non-exclusive access for read-only ops
- Includes expiration times and alternative patterns

API:
- registerReservation(): Add new reservation to tracker
- removeReservation(): Remove reservation by ID
- getActiveReservations(): Get non-expired reservations
- checkConflicts(): Check before creating new reservation
- getStats(): Get reservation statistics

Zero external dependencies - uses built-in RegExp for glob matching.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
